title: stenogyne rugosa
intro: Stenogyne rugosa, also known as Hawaiian mountain mint, is a type of flowering plant native to the Hawaiian Islands. The plant has been used in traditional Hawaiian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Stenogyne rugosa are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory issues, making it a valuable remedy for conditions such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Stenogyne rugosa include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
